compiled_state.title: Test scripts read real MERGE_HEAD during record-test-status execution — need isolation
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: When record-test-status.sh runs tests during a merge commit, test scripts that invoke hooks reading MERGE_HEAD (e.g., review-complexity-classifier.sh _is_merge_commit()) produce different results. The test framework needs MERGE_HEAD isolation for test execution — either via env var override or temporary GIT_DIR sandboxing. Separate from 9ea7-27a6 (which scopes staged files but does not isolate the test environment).

comments.body: Investigation confirmed. Fix applied in this session.
comments.author: Test
